title: OctopusGarden Scenario
description: Holdout validation scenario for OctopusGarden. See docs/architecture.md for full specification.

id.description: Unique scenario identifier (lowercase alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this scenario validates.

type.description: Scenario type. Currently 'api' only for MVP; 'functional' also accepted.

weight.description: Relative weight for aggregate satisfaction scoring. Defaults to 1.0.

satisfaction_criteria.description: Overall criteria the LLM judge uses to evaluate this scenario.

setup.description: Setup steps executed before judged steps. Failures are fatal.

steps.description: Judged steps. Each is scored by the LLM judge.

expect.description: Natural-language expectation judged by the LLM.

capture.description: Variables to extract from the response for use in later steps.

body.description: Request body. Objects/arrays are JSON-serialized; strings sent as-is.

command.description: Shell command to execute (run via sh -c). May contain {variable} references.

stdin.description: Input to send to the command's stdin. May contain {variable} references.

env.description: Environment variables to set. Values may contain {variable} references.

timeout.description: Command timeout as a Go duration (e.g. '30s', '5m', '100ms'). Default: 30s.

name.description: Variable name for substitution in later steps via {name}.

jsonpath.description: Dot-notation JSONPath (e.g. $.id, $.data.name). Only scalar values supported.

source.description: Capture source for exec steps. Can be combined with jsonpath.
